title: Wearedave
description: Come, observe with lurid curiosity the well-nourished eccentricities and oddities of the improvised world of We Are Dave. A sumptuous, full-fat feast of broken dreams, fleeting moments and fragmented lives, We Are Dave is a wholly ad-libbed experience, oozing out of an alternative, underbelly universe. Behold the citizens of We Are Dave.

venue.name: BN1 Arts Centre CIC
venue.address: New England Street, New England Street, East Sussex
